description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a predominantly dark blue and black color scheme, accented by white stars along the stock, handguard, and magazine. The rifle features a collapsible stock with a textured buttplate, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine. The handguard and barrel are decorated with a star motif, giving the weapon a distinctive, almost ceremonial or themed appearance. The upper receiver appears to have a flat top, possibly for mounting optics, but only basic iron sights are visible. The muzzle is fitted with a device that resembles a flash hider or compensator. The overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a blue and black finish, white star accents, collapsible stock, and detachable magazine. Features a star motif and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and black body, white stars on the stock, handguard, and magazine, and the collapsible stock.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat top receiver, star pattern on the handguard, and the overall slim profile.
description_view_2: Barrel-aligned view emphasizing the star motif along the handguard and the muzzle device at the end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, pistol grip, and the full length of the collapsible stock.
